title: Class 2 insufficient-context baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative insufficient-context escalation path. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish an insufficient-context payload through the registry-aligned operational context input plane.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the escalation outcome.

notes: This scenario is intended to represent conservative escalation caused by insufficient context.
It should remain distinct from emergency-triggered Class 0 scenarios and conflict-driven safe-deferral scenarios.
llm_invocation_allowed is preserved as a coarse legacy field; llm_decision_invocation_allowed and llm_guidance_generation_allowed provide the preferred interpretation.
Schema-governed context fixtures referenced by this scenario should include environmental_context.doorbell_detected.
